entries.title: Her Birthday
entries.summary: Hey there, cat. I'm having a problem. Can't decide what I should do for my wife. Her birthday is this week and I don't know if I should go big or not. What do you think?

blocks.text: Hey there, cat. I'm having a problem. Can't decide what I should do for my wife. Her birthday is this week and I don't know if I should go big or not. What do you think?

catReply.label: Meow
catReply.reply: A big meow, huh? Maybe she should get one ridiculous, memorable thing.

catReply.label: Meow
catReply.reply: A softer meow. Maybe thoughtful matters more than expensive.

beats.speaker: Lila
beats.text: Wow this place is beautiful isn't it PLAYER.

beats.speaker: Lila
beats.text: We did it! We finally got our own place.

beats.speaker: Grace
beats.text: You must be the new owner.

beats.speaker: Grace
beats.text: I am who you are renting this place from. This is a very popular spot. So you need to make sure you achieve a certain rating or I will not renew your lease.

beats.speaker: Grace
beats.text: Yes. So you better get on it.

beats.speaker: Lila
beats.text: You hear that PLAYER... We need to get a ranking.

beats.speaker: Lila
beats.text: Oh a customer! Come on, let's go in.
